Method.desc: Load sounds, create menu bar icon, and start the eventtap.
Method.doc:
Load sounds, create menu bar icon, and start the eventtap.

Returns:
 * The Tomonari object
Method.name: start

Method.desc: Stop the eventtap. The menu bar icon remains visible.
Method.doc:
Stop the eventtap. The menu bar icon remains visible and can be used to re-enable.

Returns:
 * The Tomonari object
Method.name: stop

Method.doc:
Set playback volume.

Parameters:
 * vol - A number between 0.0 (silent) and 1.0 (full volume)

Returns:
 * The Tomonari object
Method.name: setVolume
parameters: * vol - A number between 0.0 (silent) and 1.0 (full volume)

Method.desc: Open a chooser UI to switch the active sound pack.
Method.doc:
Open a chooser UI to switch the active sound pack.

Returns:
 * The Tomonari object
Method.name: selectPack

Method.doc:
Bind hotkeys for controlling Tomonari.

Parameters:
 * map - A table with optional keys:
   * toggle     = {mods, key} — enable/disable sound
   * selectPack = {mods, key} — open pack chooser
   * volumeUp   = {mods, key} — increase volume by 10%
   * volumeDown = {mods, key} — decrease volume by 10%

Returns:
 * The Tomonari object
Method.name: bindHotkeys
parameters: * map - Table with optional keys: toggle, selectPack, volumeUp, volumeDown

desc: Keyboard typing sound feedback for Hammerspoon
doc: Keyboard typing sound feedback for Hammerspoon. Plays mechanical keyboard sounds on every keystroke. Includes a menu bar icon for pack switching and volume control.
name: Tomonari
